Class-Cleric 20 — Female Human Cleric: 20
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 6 (-2) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 9 (-1) Wisdom: 18 (+4) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Neutral Deity: Azuth (LN)
Experience: 662514/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes: Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Divine Domain)
Feats: Dual Wielder; Elemental Adept (Acid); Elemental Adept (Lightning); Grappler; Magic Initiate (Druid) Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Cleric Features: Arcana Domain Spells; Arcana Domain; Arcane Abjuration; Arcane Initiate; Arcane Mastery; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Channel Divinity; Destroy Undead; Divine Domain; Divine Intervention; Potent Spellcasting; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Arcana); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spell Breaker; Spellcasting (Cleric); Turn Undead; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Divine Domain: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Azuth and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) -2 Insight: (wis) +10 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +9
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) -1 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) -2
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) -1 Stealth: (dex) -2
History: (int) -1 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) +4
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Insight; Persuasion; Religion
Languages: Common; Dwarvish; Gnomish; Orc
Skill Notes: Arcane Initiate: Skill Proficiency (Arcana)
Combat
Hit Points: 89 Initiative: -2 Armor Class: 10
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: Studded Leather Shield: None Weapons: Handaxe (+7 1d6+1 S R20/60); Light Crossbow (+4 1d8-2 P R80/320); Mace (+7 1d6+1 B); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: -2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: -2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: -2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Arcane Abjuration: R30' Can turn a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend (save DC 18 Wisdom negates), banishing up to CR 4, for 1 min
Destroy Undead: Turning destroys undead up to CR 4
Dual Wielder: +1 Armor Class when wielding two melee weapons/Can use two-weapon fighting with any one-handed weapons/Can draw or stow two one-handed weapons simultaneously
Grappler: Has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe and can restrain a grappled foe with an additional successful grapple
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 18 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +9; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: -2; Intelligence: -1; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +10
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 5; C: 24; D0: 2; D: 5 Spell Slots: C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 3; C6: 2; C7: 2; C8: 1; C9: 1 Attack: C: +10; D: +10 Spell DC: C: 18; D: 18
Spells:
Aid (C2 Abju): (Action) R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr (+Level gives +5 hit points)
Arcane Eye (C4 [Arcana Domain Spells] Divi): (Action) R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Astral Projection (C9 Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Bane (C1 Ench): (Action) R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Conjure Celestial (C7 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons an obedient CR 4 celestial for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the CR to 5 at level 9)
Create Food And Water (C3 Conj): (Action) R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Cure Wounds (C1 Evoc): (Action) Touched regains 1d8+4 hit points (+Level restores +1d8 hit points)
Death Ward (C4 Abju): (Action) Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Detect Evil And Good (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, consecration, and desecration for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Magic (C1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Magic (C1 [Arcana Domain Spells] Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Dispel Magic (C3 [Arcana Domain Spells] Abju): (Action) R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell (+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level)
Divination (C4 Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Earthquake (C8 Evoc): (Action) R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Find Traps (C2 Divi): (Action) R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Flame Strike (C5 Evoc): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 4d6 HP fire and 4d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of fire or radiant)
Guardian Of Faith (C4 Conj): (Action) R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until it has inflicted 60 HP
Guidance (C0 Divi): (Action) Willing touched gains +1d4 on 1 ability check within concentration up to 1 min
Hallow (C5 Evoc): (24 Hours) 60' radius becomes warded against celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect (save Charisma negates)
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): (10 Minutes) 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal recover from disease and poison and gain advantage on Wisdom saves, immunity to poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Hold Person (C2 Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Legend Lore (C5 Divi): (10 Minutes) Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Leomund's Secret Chest (C4 [Arcana Domain Spells] Conj): (Action) Self can move a touched 12 cubic ft chest to and from the Ethereal Plane for 60 days, after which there is a cumulative 5% chance per day of the spell ending
Light (C0 Evoc): (Action) Touched object emits a 20' bright light (save Dexterity negates) for 1 hr
Magic Circle (C3 [Arcana Domain Spells] Abju): (Minute) R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr (+Level extends the duration +1 hr)
Magic Missile (C1 [Arcana Domain Spells] Evoc): (Action) R120' 3 darts inflict 1d4+1 HP force each (+Level creates +1 dart)
Magic Weapon (C2 [Arcana Domain Spells] Tran): (Bonus) Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 4 or 6)
Mass Healing Word (C3 Evoc): (Bonus) R60' 6 targets regain 1d4+4 HP (+Level restores +1d4 HP)
Mending (C0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Nystul's Magic Aura (C2 [Arcana Domain Spells] Illu): (Action) Magic cast on the target object or willing creature reports false auras and takes effect as a different creature type for 24 hr; casting every day for 30 days makes the effects permanent
Planar Ally (C6 Conj): (10 Minutes) R60' Summons a servant of an otherworldly entity to bargain for aid
Planar Binding (C5 [Arcana Domain Spells] Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Regenerate (C7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and reattaches or regrows severed parts after 2 min
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): (Action) R60' Inflicts 4d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring cover
Teleportation Circle (C5 [Arcana Domain Spells] Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 1 year makes it permanent
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): (Action) R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
Tongues (C3 Divi): (Action) Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
Magic Notes:
Arcane Initiate: Knows 2 wizard cantrips
Arcane Mastery: Can add 1 each W6, W7, W8, and W9 spells as domain spells
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 3 times per short rest
Divine Intervention: Has a 100% chance to gain help from Azuth once per week
Elemental Adept (Acid): Spells that inflict acid damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Lightning): Spells that inflict lightning damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Potent Spellcasting: Cleric cantrips inflict +4 HP
Spell Breaker: Casting a healing spell also dispels a spell of equal or lesser level affecting the target
Spellcasting (Cleric): Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
